stats.Memory Check is designed to strengthen l: Memory Check is designed to strengthen long-term recall. Try answering in your own words before asking for help.
Flashcards work best with active recall. Try answering mentally before revealing the solution.

stats.The goal is not to judge your score, but: The goal is not to judge your score, but to understand your current preparation. Every answer helps me build your first personalised Study Plan from objective evidence.
stats.This module contributes to your initial: This module contributes to your initial assessment. Answer honestly; if you are unsure, choose your best answer. Every answer helps improve the Study Plan that follows.
stats.This module has been recorded. The evide: This module has been recorded. The evidence collected here will contribute to your learning profile, and the next module will continue the assessment.
stats.If something is still unclear, ask me no: If something is still unclear, ask me now while this module is still fresh.
stats.Ask a question about this module: Ask a question about this module
stats.The Professor could not answer right now: The Professor could not answer right now.
stats.Planner intro purpose: This is your personal study space. As your Professor, I'll help you organize your learning into manageable modules based on your available time, your learning pace and, most importantly, on your progress.
stats.Planner intro flexibility: You can complete one module per day or several modules whenever you have more time. There is no fixed schedule—study at the pace that works best for you.
stats.Planner intro debrief: At the end of every module I'll prepare a personal debrief, highlighting what you did well, the topics that deserve more attention and some suggestions to improve. If you'd like, we can also explore any question or topic in more depth together.
stats.Planner intro dashboard: Use this dashboard to monitor your overall progress, review your statistics and revisit the debrief of every completed module whenever you need.
